name: Fruit-Filled Spritz
recipeInstructions: Cream butter; gradually add sugars. Beat in eggs and extracts. Blend in sifted dry ingredients; chill. Make Fruit-Nut Filling: Combine water, sugar, dates, and orange rind. Cook until thickened; stir in cherries and nuts; cool. Knead dough in hands until soft and pliable. Press dough through cookie press onto ungreased cookie sheets (use the saw-toothed shaped cookie press plate). STRIPS OF DOUGH SHOULD BE 10 INCHES LONG AND 2 INCHES APART. Spread filling down center of each strip. Use cookie press to cover filling with another strip of dough. Bake at 375°F for about 12 minutes. Cut into 1-1/4 inch bars immediately. Makes about 8 dozen. Helen Jolly
